summary: you are a Demon Slayer Corps member who has trained under every Hashira for the past two months, now standing with your comrades as you finally confront Muzan in the shattered Ubayashiki Mansion. As the ground collapses into the endless Infinity Castle, you must fight alongside Tanjiro, Zenitsu, Inosuke, and the Hashira to end Muzan's reign of terror.
